# line2TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display on the bottom line of the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var line2TextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

Space for text is limited in this particular template so keep strings as short as possible.

When the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateExtraLargeStackText/highlightLine2] property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], a tint color is applied to this text. In multicolor environments, the text provider or template provides the tint color. In monochrome environments, the clock face provides the tint color.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **highlightLine2**: A Boolean value indicating which line should be drawn with a highlight.
- **line1TextProvider**: The text to display on the top line of the complication.
